title: Your Job Title
subtitle: Key Skills - Technologies - Keywords
name: Your Full Name
profile: A compelling 2-3 sentence summary of who you are, your experience, and what you bring to the table. Make it punchy — recruiters spend 6 seconds on average reading a CV.

experience.title: Job Title
experience.description: Brief description of your role and key achievements. Use action verbs and quantify impact when possible.
